user.title: Connect to UpzDownz
user.description: Enter your UpzDownz API key. You can find it in the UpzDownz dashboard under **Settings → API**.

data_description.api_key: Your secret API key from the UpzDownz dashboard.

pick_type.title: Add a Data Source
pick_type.description:
Sources added so far: **{pending_sources}**

Select a source type to add, or choose *Done* to save.

configure_source.title: Configure {source_type}
configure_source.description: Give this data source a name and configure how it syncs to UpzDownz.

data_description.source_name: Enter the name you want to connect your widgets to. This name will appear in your UpzDownz dashboard.
data_description.interval: How often data is collected and pushed to UpzDownz.
data_description.battery_report_all: When enabled, all battery devices are reported regardless of level. When disabled, only devices below the threshold are reported.
data_description.lights_mode: Per light sends one row per lamp and supports room grouping and brightness. Summary sends only the total count of lights on vs total.
data_description.threshold: Devices **below** this battery level will be reported. For example, 20 means any device below 20% appears in your dashboard. Current value: {threshold}%
data_description.domains_exclude: Entity domains to skip entirely. Default: group, scene, automation, script, zone and input_* domains.

pick_entities.title: Select Entities — {source_type}
pick_entities.description: Search and select the entities to include. Each one becomes a data field in UpzDownz.

data_description.source_name: Enter the name you want to connect your widgets to. This name will appear in your UpzDownz dashboard.
data_description.interval: How often a snapshot of all selected entities is pushed to UpzDownz.
data_description.entity_ids: Search by name or entity ID. Each selected entity becomes one field in your data.

field_names.title: Confirm Field Names — {source_name}
field_names.description:
{entity_count} entities selected. These field names become the column names in UpzDownz that you use when building widgets.

Use lowercase letters and underscores only, for example `indoor_temp` or `battery_level`.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Please check your key in the UpzDownz dashboard under Settings → API.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to UpzDownz. Please check your internet connection and try again.
error.row_limit: Your UpzDownz plan has reached its row limit. Please upgrade your plan or reduce the sync frequency.
error.server_error: UpzDownz returned a server error. This is usually temporary — please try again.
error.no_entities_selected: Please select at least one entity.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please check the Home Assistant logs for details.

manage.title: Manage Data Sources
manage.description: Add new data sources or remove existing ones.

configure_source.description: Give this data source a name and configure how it syncs to UpzDownz.

field_names.description: {entity_count} entities selected. These field names become the column names in UpzDownz.
